calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Ciarian O'Sullivan, Esq., in court, for Pamela Nagel, and Michael Garvey, Objectors.
Jeffrey Lowe, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Jordan Goldstein, Petitioner.
Erika Gasaway, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Dianne Keil, David Petticrew, Luanne Marner, Dolly Schwab, Sandra Dunn, and Sherry Dunn, interested parties.
Morgan Liggan, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for UCSF, interested party.
Sanford Margolin, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Brian Godfrey, and Eileen Donahue, Objectors.

The court queries whether there is opposition to the court granting the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement. No oppositions are presented.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

***After hearing, the Petition for Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment is taken off calendar.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Thompson appeared via zoom for Jordan Goldstein (petitioner).
Sanford Margolin appeared in person for Brain Godfrey and Eileen Donohue (objectors).
Ciaran O'Sullivan appeared in person for Pamela Nagel and Michael Garvey (objectors).
Philip Flanigan appeared via zoom for Bruce Schumacher and Cindy Risner (objectors).
Erika Gasaway appeared via zoom for Sandra Dunn, Sherry Dunn, Dolly Schwab, Luanna Marner, David Petticrew and Diane Keil.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that the parties reached a settlement agreement and is requesting to file an ex parte Petition for approval of settlement agreement so that they can get the property on the market for sale before winter. The Court authorizes parties to file an ex parte Petition for approval of settlement agreement. Both matters are continued to October 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To Sep-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Loew appeared by zoom for Jordan Goldstein (petitioner/trustee).
Philip Flanigan appeared by zoom for Bruce Schumacher and Cindy Schumacher Risner (respondents).
Sanford Margolin appeared by zoom for Bryan Godfrey and Eileen Donahue (beneficiaries).
Sean McKissick appeared by zoom for University of California San Francisco (respondent).
Ciaran O'Sullivan for Michael Garvey and Pamela Nagle (beneficiaries/respondents).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that the parties have not met and conferred regarding resolution of this dispute. Discussion was held as to whether the parties would voluntarily participate in mediation, or be forced to do so, and whether it is appropriate for the court to issue a Breslin order. The court will issue a Breslin order, and orders the parties to mediation. Mediation is to be completed by August 20, 2024. The Petition for Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment is continued to September 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of mediation is also set for September 23, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Loew appeared by zoom for Jordan Goldstein (petitioner).
Philip Flanigan appeared by zoom for Bruce Schumacher and Cindy Schumacher Risner (respondents/objectors).
Ciarin O'Sullivan for Michael Garvey and Pamela Nagle (beneficiaries).
Sanford Margolin appeared by zoom for Eileen Donahue and Brian Godfrey (beneficiaries/objectors).
Thu Nguyen appeared by zoom for University of California and the University of California San Francisco Foundation.

The court stated that it reviewed the petition and the responses/written objections. Mrs. Nguyen requested 60 days to review the pleadings. Mr. O'Sullivan requested 60 days to file written objections and requested that the court issue a Breslin order. Mrs. Nguyen and Mr. Margolin expressed their positions with respect to the court not issuing a Breslin order at this time. The Petition for Instructions Concerning Trust Amendments is continued to April 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court will reserve the issue of mediation to be addressed at that time.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Concerning Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Jan-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
